faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for residential use around children and pets. faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: New Hyde Park residents typically encounter yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. These species often build nests in eaves, attics, trees, and underground locations. Our technicians are experienced in identifying and safely removing all wasp species common to Long Island and use species-specific removal strategies for best results.
